cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: 这周想接手报税，20 张票左右，下周要申报，第一次来。
engagement_history: asked whether a slot can be held

mustInclude: high short-term candidate after facts are complete
mustAvoid: treating price as the only value signal

cases.label: happy_path

input.lead_content: 上次在你们家做过，这周末还想再来续约顺便处理年报。

mustInclude: long-term value uplifted for return visit
lower acquisition cost reflected in roi
mustAvoid: scoring the returning customer like a cold lead

cases.label: edge_case

input.lead_content: 月底前想把年报和报税理顺，这周想先看看怎么做，周六下午能来吗？

mustInclude: slot and schedule opportunity cost considered
mustAvoid: ignoring capacity cost in the valuation

cases.label: risk_case

input.lead_content: 有没有保证零风险、这周一定能处理好的？

mustInclude: overall value constrained by claim risk
